name: Some of This and That (or "Dump Cake") Desser
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9 x 14-inch pan with food release.
2. Dump the ingredients in the pan in the order listed.
3. Slice the oleo into pats all over the top of the cake.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
5. Cut into small squares or spoon out the cake.
6. Serve warm from the oven with high-quality vanilla ice cream (homemade preferred).
7. Alternatively, serve cold with whipped cream or topping—or just plain is fine.
Variations on a Theme:
- Add 1 cup raisins and sprinkle nutmeg to the apple filling
- Substitute fruit pie filling of your choice
- Mix half apple filling and half cherry filling
Note: This recipe is not recommended by Weight Watchers. It is very rich and delicious, but a little will go a long way! Enjoy in good health.
